_comment: Virtual addresses (= file offsets for the .text region, modulo the 0x1000 PT_LOAD page-alignment skew) of HarfBuzz functions and cc::PaintOp rasterizer-dispatch anchors in the brave binary. Frida applies these as Module.findBaseAddress('brave') + offset. To refresh after a Brave update, see FINDING_OFFSETS.md. Phase 1 (draw_text) and Phase 2 (draw_rect for kDrawRect/RRect/IRect/Oval) hooks only fire in the gpu-process — the renderer never executes cc::PaintOpWithFlags::RasterWithFlags.

offsets._color_comment: PaintFlags.color_ is SkColor4f (4 little-endian f32: R,G,B,A) at offset 0 of the dispatcher's flags arg (rsi). PaintOpWithFlags base is 0x50 bytes (PaintOp uint8 type + padding + CorePaintFlags 28B + 4B pad + 5 sk_sp ptrs + targeted_hdr_headroom), so op->flags.color_ is also at op+0x08.
offsets._ctm_comment: Phase 8: SkCanvas current-transform-matrix readout. SkCanvas's fMCRec member (pointer to the top of the matrix-clip stack) is at this->+sk_canvas_mcrec_offset. fMCRec points at an MCRec whose fMatrix field is at +mcrec_matrix_offset. The matrix kind is SkM44: 16 little-endian f32 in COLUMN-MAJOR layout (SkM44::fMat[c*4 + r], so for a 2D affine sx = m[0]*x + m[4]*y + m[12], sy = m[1]*x + m[5]*y + m[13]). Verified in 1.90.122-1 by disassembling SkCanvas::drawRect (0x3f71470) and SkCanvas::drawTextBlob (0x3f61330) — both do `mov 0x640(this),%rNN; add $0x18,%rNN; lea &rect,%rsi; call SkM44::mapRect`.
